message:
fix: JSONL reader now filters tombstone issues; SQLite timestamp parsing adds plain DATETIME format

JSONLReader.LoadIssues() was returning tombstone-status issues, violating
the IssueReader interface contract. Since LoadIssuesFiltered, CountIssues,
GetIssueByID, and GetLastModified all delegate to LoadIssues, fixing it
there cascades to all methods.

SQLiteReader.GetLastModified() now also handles the plain SQLite DATETIME
format "2006-01-02 15:04:05" as a third fallback after RFC3339Nano and
RFC3339.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
